description: Universal signal harvester: snapshots every engine's published top picks point-in-time into justhodl-signals so the existing outcome-checker/scorecard/confluence/fade/conviction pipeline computes per-engine edge across the full fleet (not just the ~47 that hand-log). De-duped 6d, point-in-time baseline price, skip-on-no-price.

schedule.description: Daily universal signal harvest at 23:15 UTC
